# Error Translator

> Offline Python traceback translator and exception explainer.

Error Translator turns raw Python tracebacks into clear explanations and actionable fixes. It is designed for developers, students, and automation workflows that need deterministic, local error translation.

## Primary Keywords

- Python error translator
- Python traceback translator
- Python exception explainer
- Stack trace analyzer for Python
- CLI tool for Python debugging
- Offline Python debugging assistant

## Canonical Links

- Homepage: https://github.com/gourabanandad/error-translator-cli-v2
- Source: https://github.com/gourabanandad/error-translator-cli-v2
- Package: https://pypi.org/project/error-translator-cli-v2/
- Docs: https://github.com/gourabanandad/error-translator-cli-v2/tree/master/docs
- Issues: https://github.com/gourabanandad/error-translator-cli-v2/issues

## Interfaces

- CLI command: explain-error
- Python API: error_translator.core.translate_error
- Auto-hook mode: error_translator.auto
- FastAPI app: error_translator.api.server:app

## Feature Summary

- Deterministic regex rule engine
- Optional C extension acceleration with Python fallback
- Offline and privacy-friendly execution
- JSON output mode for scripting
- Optional AST insight hints for supported errors

## Install

pip install error-translator-cli-v2

## Typical Use Cases

- Explain unfamiliar Python exceptions quickly
- Improve CI or log pipelines with readable diagnostics
- Teach Python errors with beginner-friendly wording
- Add traceback translation to internal tools via API
